name: K&K Superstore Southern Public Company Limited
summary: K&K Superstore Southern Public Company Limited engages in the distribution of consumer products in Thailand. Its utensils products comprise household cleaning products, including detergents, fabric softeners, compressed petals, etc.; products for daily use, which include toothpaste, toothbrush, mouthwash, etc.; skin and hair products, such as shampoo, shower cream, soap, etc.; beauty products comprising powder, cream, skin care, cologne, etc.; and products for children and adults, such as brushes for milk, baby diapers, adult diapers, etc. The company's consumer products include beverage products, which include cocoa powder, coffee, non-dairy cream, etc.; flavored milk products, such as milk powder, sweetened condensed milk, UHT milk, etc.; beverage products, including drinking water, soft drinks, health drinks, etc.; condiments and dry food products, such as condiments, vegetable oil, rice, etc.; and snack products comprising chewing gum, candy, etc. It operates 26 stores under the K&K Superstore brand name. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Songkhla, Thailand.
